sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_FHI_Lds_Leads')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.LP_FHI_Lds_Leads
IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_MXH_Lds_Leads')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.LP_MXH_Lds_Leads

activities.name: SWR
activities.description: Source changed to Query with nolock instead of table

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT [id]                        AS [id],
       [cst_id]                    AS [cst_id],
       [leadnumber]                AS [LeadNumber],
       [productid]                 AS [Productid],
       [prod2]                     AS [Prod2],
       [prod3]                     AS [Prod3],
       [prod4]                     AS [Prod4],
       [qty]                       AS [Qty],
       [qty2]                      AS [Qty2],
       [qty3]                      AS [Qty3],
       [qty4]                      AS [Qty4],
       [entrydate]                 AS [EntryDate],
       [dsp_id]                    AS [dsp_id],
       [val_id]                    AS [val_ID],
       [pro_id]                    AS [pro_ID],
       [phn_id]                    AS [phn_ID],
       [src_id]                    AS [src_id],
       [brn_id]                    AS [brn_id],
       [sds_id]                    AS [sds_id],
       [rnk_id]                    AS [rnk_id],
       [stg_id]                    AS [stg_id],
       [owner_id]                  AS [owner_id],
       [srs_id]                    AS [srs_id],
       [dateentered]               AS [DateEntered],
       [apptdate]                  AS [ApptDate],
       [app_id]                    AS [app_id],
       [callbackdate]              AS [CallBackDate],
       [callbackemp_id]            AS [CallBackEmp_id],
       [slr_id]                    AS [slr_id],
       [slr_id2]                   AS [slr_id2],
       [slr_split]                 AS [slr_split],
       [setby]                     AS [SetBy],
       [verifiedby]                AS [VerifiedBy],
       [confirmedby]               AS [ConfirmedBy],
       [apptset]                   AS [ApptSet],
       [verified]                  AS [Verified],
       [confirmed]                 AS [Confirmed],
       [issued]                    AS [Issued],
       [netissued]                 AS [NetIssued],
       [sat]                       AS [Sat],
       [sold]                      AS [Sold],
       [gsa]                       AS [GSA],
       [everset]                   AS [EverSet],
       [eververified]              AS [EverVerified],
       [everconfirmed]             AS [EverConfirmed],
       [everissued]                AS [EverIssued],
       [evernetissued]             AS [EverNetIssued],
       [eversat]                   AS [EverSat],
       [lastchangedon]             AS [LastChangedOn],
       [lastchangedby]             AS [LastChangedBy],
       [lastchangedprogram]        AS [LastChangedProgram],
       [notes]                     AS [Notes],
       [clq_id]                    AS [clq_id],
       [cqd_id]                    AS [cqd_id],
       [lastcall]                  AS [LastCall],
       [lastresult]                AS [LastResult],
       [lognumber]                 AS [LogNumber],
       [in1_id]                    AS [in1_id],
       [work_order_id]             AS [work_order_id],
       [datereceived]              AS [DateReceived],
       [apptduration]              AS [ApptDuration],
       [followupdate]              AS [FollowUpDate],
       [lds_user_1]                AS [lds_user_1],
       [lds_user_2]                AS [lds_user_2],
       [lds_user_3]                AS [lds_user_3],
       [lds_user_4]                AS [lds_user_4],
       [lds_user_5]                AS [lds_user_5],
       [lds_user_6]                AS [lds_user_6],
       [lds_user_7]                AS [lds_user_7],
       [lds_user_8]                AS [lds_user_8],
       [lds_user_9]                AS [lds_user_9],
       [lds_user_10]               AS [lds_user_10],
       [lds_user_11]               AS [lds_user_11],
       [lds_user_12]               AS [lds_user_12],
       [lds_user_13]               AS [lds_user_13],
       [lds_user_14]               AS [lds_user_14],
       [lds_user_15]               AS [lds_user_15],
       [lds_user_16]               AS [lds_user_16],
       [lds_user_17]               AS [lds_user_17],
       [lds_user_18]               AS [lds_user_18],
       [lds_user_19]               AS [lds_user_19],
       [lds_user_20]               AS [lds_user_20],
       [last_icon_status]          AS [last_icon_status],
       [deferdate]                 AS [deferdate],
       [anr_init_likelihoodtobuy]  AS [anr_init_likelihoodtobuy],
       [anr_init_likelysaleamount] AS [anr_init_likelysaleamount],
       [anr_init_expectedvalue]    AS [anr_init_expectedvalue],
       [anr_curr_likelihoodtobuy]  AS [anr_curr_likelihoodtobuy],
       [anr_curr_likelysaleamount] AS [anr_curr_likelysaleamount],
       [anr_curr_expectedvalue]    AS [anr_curr_expectedvalue],
       [anr_logit_rank] as [anr_logit_rank],
        [anr_reg_rank] as [anr_reg_rank],
        [anr_ev_rank] as [anr_ev_rank],
        [AP_ID] as [AP_ID],
        [e13n_uuid] as [e13n_uuid],
        [e13n_experiments] as [e13n_experiments]
FROM   [dbo].[lds_leads] with (nolock)
